description: Style Notelove passport EDP by Peynet is sure to melt any girl's heart with its whimsical angel print on the box and its warm, sensual tones . A citrusy fragrance with a sweet dry down, we recommend this for evening wear. A perfume that will rekindle your girlhood memories of scrap books and tea parties in the lawn, this is just the summer fragrance you were looking for!Product DetailsLove Passport EDP for women comes in a pink flacon with spherical glass topCautionDo not spray near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying on eyesSize50 ml
